prompt: Write a new CLAUDE.md error handling section from scratch, already distilled.

assertions.name: already_distilled
assertions.description: Written short from the start — no verbose-then-compressed pattern, no before/after structure

assertions.name: all_rules_present
assertions.description: All 4 rules present: (1) propose fix immediately, (2) explain user actions with reason, (3) never blind retry, (4) ask user after 3 attempts

assertions.name: no_filler
assertions.description: Zero hedging words: should, might, perhaps, consider, important, ensure
